questions.question: Does the UploadPipelineService correctly implement BUD-06 HTTP PUT upload with NIP-98 Authorization header containing the correct method, URL, and body hash?
Does the upload pipeline replace local-blob:<sha256> placeholders with actual remote URLs in the media_json column after successful upload, and does it correctly update message_media.remote_url?
Does the retry logic implement correct exponential backoff delays (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 30s max) with 5 max attempts, and correctly distinguish non-retryable errors (413, 415) from retryable errors?
Does partial failure handling work correctly - message not marked complete when any upload fails, per-attachment status tracking, and retryFailedUploads retries only failed attachments?
Does the concurrency limit correctly enforce maximum 2 concurrent uploads per identity, queuing additional uploads until slots free?
Does the flushOutgoingQueue integration correctly skip messages with incomplete media uploads while still processing text-only messages, extending (not replacing) the existing queue logic?
Does upload progress reporting correctly send IPC messages via nostling:media:upload-progress channel with status transitions (uploading → uploaded/failed) and correct byte counts?
Does upload cancellation correctly prevent further upload attempts and revert the upload status to pending, allowing future retry?
Does the upload pipeline correctly persist queued state across restarts by relying on database-backed upload_status, ensuring uploads can resume after app restart?
Is there any dead code, unused imports, or unreachable code paths in the upload pipeline implementation or its integration points?
Are there sufficient integration tests covering the upload pipeline's interaction with the database, HTTP uploads, retry logic, placeholder replacement, and progress reporting?
